description: Clean and corporate. Montserrat for bold headlines, Inter for readable body, JetBrains Mono for data and code.
Strong editorial voice. Oswald commands attention in headlines, Lato stays readable, Inconsolata adds technical contrast.
Modern and minimal. Poppins is geometric and friendly, Open Sans is universally readable, Space Mono adds digital character.
Luxury and elegance. Playfair Display brings serif sophistication, Source Sans Pro stays neutral, Cormorant Garamond adds classical accent.
Playful and consumer-friendly. Fredoka One is bubbly, Nunito is soft and readable, Comic Neue adds whimsy without looking cheap.
Futuristic tech aesthetic. Orbitron is geometric and sci-fi, Exo 2 bridges display and body, Fira Code is the coder's choice.
Warm and human. Merriweather is a welcoming serif, Cabin is approachable, Courier Prime adds an authentic typed-letter feel.
Geometric precision. Raleway is thin and elegant, Work Sans is workhorse readable, IBM Plex Mono is clean and engineered.
Maximum impact. Anton screams from the screen, Roboto keeps body text grounded, Share Tech Mono adds digital edge.
Classic and literary. Lora is an elegant contemporary serif, Source Serif Pro matches in body, DM Mono adds modern code contrast.
Swiss neutrality. Inter and Roboto are the safest sans-serifs available, Roboto Mono keeps the monospace equally clean.
Creative studio feel. Instrument Sans is fresh and distinctive, Manrope is geometric and modern, JetBrains Mono adds developer cred.
Startup-friendly and approachable. DM Sans is geometric and warm, Inter is the industry standard body, JetBrains Mono for data.
Data-first design. Barlow Condensed packs headlines tight, Barlow stays readable in body, Fira Mono is perfect for numbers and code.
Premium fintech aesthetic. Plus Jakarta Sans is refined and modern, Inter is trusted body text, Fira Code handles numbers elegantly.
